title: 下沉市场分析
description: 分析县级及以下市场的客户覆盖与提货表现，发掘下沉市场增长机会

kpis.label: 县级客户数
kpis.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_code) as v FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL AND (customer_descrptn LIKE '%县%' OR customer_descrptn LIKE '%镇%' OR customer_descrptn LIKE '%乡%' OR customer_descrptn LIKE '%村%')
kpis.help: 本月有提货的县级及以下客户数（客户名含县/镇/乡/村）

kpis.label: 县级提货量
kpis.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(deliv_qty_mt),1) as v FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL AND (customer_descrptn LIKE '%县%' OR customer_descrptn LIKE '%镇%' OR customer_descrptn LIKE '%乡%' OR customer_descrptn LIKE '%村%')
kpis.help: 县级客户本月总提货量

kpis.label: 县级占比
kpis.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN customer_descrptn LIKE '%县%' OR customer_descrptn LIKE '%镇%' OR customer_descrptn LIKE '%乡%' OR customer_descrptn LIKE '%村%' THEN deliv_qty_mt ELSE 0 END)*100.0/NULLIF(SUM(deliv_qty_mt),0),1) as v FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL
kpis.help: 县级客户提货量占总提货量的比例

kpis.label: 县级增速(vs上月)
kpis.sql: SELECT ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' THEN deliv_qty_mt ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202602' THEN deliv_qty_mt ELSE 0 END))*100.0/NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202602' THEN deliv_qty_mt ELSE 0 END),0),1) as v FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time) IN ('202602','202603') AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL AND (customer_descrptn LIKE '%县%' OR customer_descrptn LIKE '%镇%' OR customer_descrptn LIKE '%乡%' OR customer_descrptn LIKE '%村%')
kpis.help: 县级客户本月提货量相比上月的增长率

stages.title: 区域分布
stages.description: 各分公司的县级客户数与提货量
stages.sql: SELECT brnch_descrptn as 分公司, COUNT(DISTINCT customer_code) as 县级客户数, ROUND(SUM(deliv_qty_mt),1) as 县级提货量_吨, ROUND(SUM(deliv_qty_mt)/NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT customer_code),0),2) as 单客户均量_吨 FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL AND (customer_descrptn LIKE '%县%' OR customer_descrptn LIKE '%镇%' OR customer_descrptn LIKE '%乡%' OR customer_descrptn LIKE '%村%') GROUP BY brnch_descrptn ORDER BY 县级提货量_吨 DESC
stages.insight_focus: 哪些分公司下沉市场覆盖好？哪些分公司还有空白？

stages.title: 产品偏好
stages.description: 县级客户的产品线偏好分析
stages.sql: SELECT deliv_prodctnline_descrptn as 产线, ROUND(SUM(deliv_qty_mt),1) as 提货量_吨, COUNT(DISTINCT customer_code) as 客户数, ROUND(100.0*SUM(deliv_qty_mt)/NULLIF((SELECT SUM(deliv_qty_mt) FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL AND (customer_descrptn LIKE '%县%' OR customer_descrptn LIKE '%镇%' OR customer_descrptn LIKE '%乡%' OR customer_descrptn LIKE '%村%')),0),1) as 占比_pct FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL AND (customer_descrptn LIKE '%县%' OR customer_descrptn LIKE '%镇%' OR customer_descrptn LIKE '%乡%' OR customer_descrptn LIKE '%村%') GROUP BY deliv_prodctnline_descrptn ORDER BY 提货量_吨 DESC
stages.insight_focus: 下沉市场偏好哪些产品线？与整体结构有何差异？

stages.title: 增速排名
stages.description: 各分公司县级市场环比增速排名
stages.sql: SELECT brnch_descrptn as 分公司, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202602' THEN deliv_qty_mt ELSE 0 END),1) as 上月量_吨, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' THEN deliv_qty_mt ELSE 0 END),1) as 本月量_吨, ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' THEN deliv_qty_mt ELSE 0 END)-SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202602' THEN deliv_qty_mt ELSE 0 END))*100.0/NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202602' THEN deliv_qty_mt ELSE 0 END),0),1) as 增速_pct FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time) IN ('202602','202603') AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL AND (customer_descrptn LIKE '%县%' OR customer_descrptn LIKE '%镇%' OR customer_descrptn LIKE '%乡%' OR customer_descrptn LIKE '%村%') GROUP BY brnch_descrptn HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202602' THEN deliv_qty_mt ELSE 0 END) > 0 ORDER BY 增速_pct DESC
stages.insight_focus: 哪些分公司下沉市场增长最快？哪些出现下滑？

summary_prompt: 根据以上下沉市场分析数据（区域分布、产品偏好、增速排名），请以市场拓展视角总结：1)下沉市场整体表现，2)重点增长区域，3)建议的2个下沉策略。不超过150字。
